queries.Diffusion / Flow as Policy: cat:cs.LG AND (title:"Diffusion" OR title:"Flow Matching") AND (title:"Policy" OR title:"Offline Reinforcement Learning" OR title:"Imitation Learning" OR abs:"diffusion policy")
queries.RL Fine-tuning for Diffusion / Flow: cat:cs.LG AND (title:"Reinforcement Learning" OR title:"RLHF" OR title:"Reward") AND (title:"Diffusion" OR title:"Flow Matching" OR abs:"flow matching")
queries.Discrete Diffusion for Language: (cat:cs.CL OR cat:cs.LG) AND (title:"Discrete Diffusion" OR title:"Masked Diffusion" OR abs:"discrete diffusion") AND (abs:"language" OR abs:"text generation" OR abs:"token")
queries.Flow Matching for RL / Language: (cat:cs.LG OR cat:cs.CL) AND title:"Flow Matching" AND (abs:"policy" OR abs:"reinforcement learning" OR abs:"language model" OR abs:"sequence generation")
queries.Diffusion Language Models: cat:cs.CL AND (title:"Diffusion Language Model" OR title:"Diffusion LM" OR (title:"Diffusion" AND title:"Language Model"))
queries.Soft Query Refinement: (cat:cs.IR OR cat:cs.CL OR cat:cs.LG) AND (abs:"soft query" OR abs:"soft query refinement" OR abs:"soft query expansion" OR abs:"latent query refinement" OR abs:"continuous query" OR (abs:"query embedding" AND (abs:"refinement" OR abs:"reformulation" OR abs:"rewriting")))
queries.Query Reformulation for Retrieval / RAG: (cat:cs.IR OR cat:cs.CL) AND (title:"Query Rewriting" OR title:"Query Reformulation" OR title:"Query Refinement" OR title:"Query Expansion" OR abs:"query rewriting" OR abs:"query reformulation" OR abs:"query refinement") AND (abs:"retrieval" OR abs:"dense retrieval" OR abs:"retrieval-augmented" OR abs:"RAG")
